form.formComment: Racing well recently. At the latest run favourite; scored a big 3.5 len win at Newcastle All Weather March 19 over 1200m defeating Argy Bhaji carrying 63.5kg at $2.90. The start before that 2nd of 11 at Southwell All Weather on March 10 over 1200m, 0.8 len behind Judgment Call with 61kg at $4.30. Capable enough on his day and can make it back to back victories.
